title: Lead Instructional Designer at Osmania University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Osmania University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
